0.q: pL-opurB was reconstructed with the opuB operon and the yvaV gene, which is a regulator for expression of the opuB operon.

1.q: Osmoprotectant uptake (Opu) systems transport compatible solutes into cells to help them tolerate osmotic stress. OpuA, OpuB, and OpuC belong to the ATP-binding cassette transporter superfamily.
